close_reason: Doc is accurate: credential discovery happens at first network call, not at build_credential
description:
src/lib.rs:83 from_uri docstring says 'Credential discovery is deferred to the first actual network call.' This is correct only in the sense that no token request is made — but build_credential() at line 154 calls ManagedIdentityCredential::new(None) (and DeveloperToolsCredential::new(None) for chained), which can return Err for misconfiguration of the credential setup itself (e.g. invalid IMDS hostname override).

Reader confusion: a user who reads 'deferred to first network call' may not expect from_uri to fail with a credential error. The docstring should clarify: 'No token is requested; the credential objects are constructed eagerly and may fail if their *construction* arguments are invalid (e.g. malformed IMDS endpoint override).'
title: Crate doc says 'credential discovery deferred' but build_credential is called eagerly
